text: Title: 🐱 LongCat-2.0 is now fully open-source — MIT licensed, no restrictions. Since our launch a few days ago, the response from the community has been incredible. Thank you for all the feedback, discussions, and interest. Today, we’re releasing the model weights and inference code https://t.co/5t3EiqFlCJ URL Source: https://x.com/Meituan_LongCat/status/2073768940078317713 Published Time: 2026-07-05T14:00:18.000Z Markdown Content: 🐱 LongCat-2.0 is now fully open-source — MIT licensed, no restrictions. Since our launch a few days ago, the response from the community has been incredible. Thank you for all the feedback, discussions, and interest. Today, we’re releasing the model weights and inference code to everyone. ◆ 1.6T MoE · ~48B active · 1M token context ◆ Agent-native: Integrates directly with Claude Code, OpenClaw, and Hermes Agent ◆ Deployment: Support both GPU and NPU platforms— verified on large-scale domestic clusters 📑 Tech Blog: [longcat.ai/blog/longcat-2…](https://longcat.ai/blog/longcat-2.0/) 🤗 HuggingFace: [huggingface.co/meituan-longca…](https://huggingface.co/meituan-longcat/LongCat-2.0) 💻 GitHub: [github.com/meituan-longca…](https://github.com/meituan-longcat/LongCat-2.0) 🪄 ModelScope: [modelscope.ai/collections/me…](https://modelscope.ai/collections/meituan-longcat/LongCat-20) 👇 Inference Code GPU: [github.com/sgl-project/sg…](https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/30042) NPU: [github.com/meituan-longca…](https://github.com/meituan-longcat/SGLang-FluentLLM/tree/npu) [![Image 1](https://pbs.twimg.com/media/HMeB2vHasAAvf5y?format=webp&name=medium)](https://x.com/Meituan_LongCat/status/2073768940078317713/photo/1) [![Image 2: user avatar](https://pbs.twimg.com/profile_images/1961703766996258817/krp4C7yC_normal.png)](https://x.com/Meituan_LongCat) Introducing LongCat-2.0 🐱 1.6T parameters · MoE with ~48B active · 1M context The full model behind Owl Alpha on [@OpenRouter](https://x.com/OpenRouter) — now available. Built for agentic coding from the ground up: ◆ LongCat Sparse Attention (LSA) — scales efficiently for 1M-context tokens ◆ [![Image 3](https://pbs.twimg.com/media/HMB0LgWbUAEuDcU?format=webp&name=small)](https://x.com/Meituan_LongCat/status/2071783587205308721/photo/1) [![Image 4](https://pbs.twimg.com/media/HMB0LgaaEAA3JS5?format=webp&name=small)](https://x.com/Meituan_LongCat/status/2071783587205308721/photo/2)
